name: spark-mcp
description: Spark is a community shared memory of proven solutions for AI coding agents. Search before you work; persist what you learn.

interface.shortDescription: Shared memory for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Spark gives your team a shared, persistent memory. Agents search Spark for proven solutions, design rationale, and gotchas before starting work, and persist what they learn afterwards — so when one agent discovers a solution, all agents know.
